rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Coffin (8) shows where things already stand: release an outdated pattern gracefully. Coffin colors your calling through the part of the old path that has already finished, and the rest that is needed before anything genuinely new can take root. In Present, Crossroads (22) becomes the pivot, so multiple paths require explicit criteria turns into both pressure and opportunity. Here, Crossroads emphasizes a vocational fork in the road, where not every path deserves the same loyalty or sacrifice. Future closes with Heart (24), and the directional message is the need to choose what aligns with your core values when the pivot receives consistent attention. Heart colors your calling through what still feels genuinely meaningful. Coffin (8) with Heart (24) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of ending and love, asking you to allow closure and protect recovery time while staying alert to idealizing without boundaries. Crossroads (22) is the real hinge in this spread. Crossroads often points to a vocational fork in the road, where not every path deserves the same loyalty or sacrifice in your calling. Coffin (8) with Heart (24) keep emphasizing a blend of ending and love, asking you to allow closure and protect recovery time while staying alert to idealizing without boundaries. Choose the path aligned with values so Heart (24) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
